case_title: 640 CLAY STREET LLC VS. SALEEM MBOGE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70362302), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 640 CLAY STREET LLC SERVED JUL-07-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT MBOGE, SALEEM

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 640 CLAY STREET LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MBOGE, SALEEM DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1060 BUSH STREET APT.312 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70481172)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 640 CLAY STREET LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MBOGE, SALEEM DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70481172) AS TO DEFENDANT MBOGE, SALEEM DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY FAIR RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF 640 CLAY STREET LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MBOGE, SALEEM
